snippet.title: Louis Aura Velvet Orchid Perfume Video
snippet.description:
Louis Aura Velvet Orchid | JNTUH Road Kukatpally | ₹449 Only

Bold yet elegant. Floral yet irresistibly seductive.
A luxurious fragrance that blends rich florals with creamy warmth for a glamorous and unforgettable presence.

Top Notes: Rum, Honey, Jasmine Sambac
Middle Notes: Rose Oil from Turkey, Orchid, Amber, Spices 
Base Notes: Sandalwood, Benzoin, Vanilla

Long-lasting | Floral & Creamy | Sensual Luxury | IFRA Compliant

Just ₹449 for 50ml
Available now at Louis Aura Store – KPHB Colony
DM to order or visit our store today.
400+ inspired perfumes for men, women & unisex.
